name: Microsoft.OData.Edm
description:
Classes to represent, construct, parse, serialize and validate entity data models. Supports OData v4 and v4.01. Targets .NET 8 or above.
OData .NET library is open source at http://github.com/OData/odata.net. Documentation for the library can be found at https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/odata/.
